title: cyperus retrorsus var. australis
intro: Cyperus retrorsus var. australis, also known as the Australian retrorsus sedge, is a plant species belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Cyperus retrorsus var. australis typically involve infusions, decoctions, or poultices made from its roots or leaves.
